settings.title: Suite Caldera
settings.summary: Our signature suite, cut into the cliff edge with a private plunge pool above the caldera.
settings.description:
The Suite Caldera is the most coveted room in the resort — a whitewashed cave-suite opening onto a private terrace and plunge pool that hangs over the volcano's rim.

Inside, hand-troweled walls, a sunken stone bath and a king bed dressed in island linen. Outside, nothing but the sea, the sky, and the slow turn of the Santorini sunset.
settings.rates:
Low season (Apr–May, Oct) | €320
Mid season (Jun, Sep) | €420
High season (Jul–Aug) | €560
settings.rates_note: Rates include breakfast and all taxes. Minimum 3 nights in high season.

seo.description: A cliffside cave-suite with a private plunge pool over the Santorini caldera.
